name: Lamb Bredie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Lamb, cut to 1 in. pieces
4 medium Carrot, cut into 3/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Debone the lamb.
2. In a heavy Dutch oven or large saucepan, cook onions and garlic in hot oil until onion is tender but not brown.
3. Season lamb pieces with a little salt and pepper.
4. Add lamb to the pot; brown lamb pieces in hot oil, adding more oil if necessary.
5. Add cabbage, carrots, green chili peppers, stick cinnamon, and whole cloves. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer for 1 1/4 hours. Do not stir.
7. Add water only if necessary.
8. Remove cinnamon and cloves. Skim off fat.
Serving Ideas: Cooked rice, if desired
Notes: South Africa
